The '''JAN Camp''' was located on [[Mrlsst/Legends|Mrlsst]] and was one of the primary camps for the [[Justice Action Network]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]].<ref name="LE" />

The camp was located approximately 400 kilometers north of the [[Mrlsst Trade and Science Academy]] along a swampy sea coast. It was positioned amongst the tall [[greenstalk]] trees which provide cover for the encampment. The JAN used camouflage nets to enhance the protective effect of the greenstalks and set up [[Sensor/Legends|sensor]] pods in the surrounding trees to provide early warning against intruders.<ref name="LE" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] JAN leader [[Kelsek]] used this camp to train his strike team before the planned attack on an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Unidentified Torpedo Sphere (Tallaan)|Torpedo Sphere]] docked at [[Tallaan]].<ref name="LE" />
